{#- Blog comments (giscus, backed by GitHub Discussions). Post pages only. Config comes from conf.py via _ext/giscus.py. Starts hidden; static/js/giscus.js unhides it once the widget is in. With JS off, readers get nothing instead of an empty box under a heading. data-term is the source file path, not the URL, so moving the site to another domain keeps threads attached to their posts. A post opts out with a bare ":no_comments:" field at the top of its .rst file. -#} {% if is_blog_post and giscus_repo %}

{{ _('Comments') }}

{%- if giscus_policy_url %}

{% trans %}Please read the{% endtrans %} {{ _('commenting guidelines') }} {% trans %}before posting.{% endtrans %}

{%- endif %}
{% endif %}
